top_signals.title: Iran Warns More Seaways Could Close as US Reimposes Naval Blockade
top_signals.summary: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps has threatened to close "all other export corridors that benefit the U.S. and its allies", Iranian media reported, after Iran shut the Strait of Hormuz and the U.S. reimposed a naval blockade of Iranian ports."Regional energy exports are either shared by all…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix South Korean shares jump 8% as Asia tech stocks rally
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix led a broad rally in Asian technology shares on Wednesday, tracking a rebound in U.S. semiconductor shares after a sharp selloff earlier this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea to modify 76-year-old law to classify cryptocurrencies as national assets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Money Market Committee meeting – June 2026
top_signals.summary: The Money Markets Committee is a forum for market participants and authorities to discuss the UK unsecured deposits and funding market and securities lending and repo markets.

top_signals.title: Great British Summer Savings: Families can now find deals closer to home at the click of a button
top_signals.summary: Find thousands of restaurants, cinemas, theatres and other attractions near you offering customer discounts following the Chancellor’s summer tax cuts.

top_signals.title: Spanish Police take down €140 million cyber fraud ring, arrest four
top_signals.summary: The Spanish Police dismantled a cybercrime and money-laundering organization that made €140 million ($160 million) from investment fraud and business email compromise (BEC) attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Microsoft: Some Dell PCs shut down after recent Windows updates
top_signals.summary: Microsoft is blocking this month's Windows 11 security updates on some Dell devices because they are causing shutdowns and performance issues. [...]
